summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No GitHub mutations are planned. Most open PRs remain non-mutating keep/needs-human items because this shard has no shared canonical, several checks or review-bot gates are unresolved, and low-signal/fix/merge paths are disabled. Security-shaped linked refs are quarantined only for the affected items.
